# Machine Keys - Common ASP.NET MachineKey values found in leaked configs
# Format: validationKey,decryptionKey
# Source: Various public disclosures, GitHub leaks, and config dumps
# Note: These keys are known/compromised - useful for testing ViewState deserialization attacks
# See: https://github.com/swisskyrepo/PayloadsAllTheThings/tree/master/Insecure%20Deserialization
# Last reviewed: 2024-01
